name: Stranda Ski Resort
description: Stranda Ski Resort is widely considered the "Freeride Capital" of Scandinavia. Perched high above the Storfjord—the gateway to the UNESCO-protected Geirangerfjord—it offers a visual experience that feels almost surreal. It is one of the few places on earth where you can carve down 1,000 meters of vertical while looking directly into the deep blue waters of a Norwegian fjord.
